option_dependency_t(3) Library Functions Manual option_dependency_t(3)

NAME

option_dependency_t - Option dependency.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/builder.h>

Data Fields


const char * option_name
The option that has the dependency. dependency_type_t type
Type of dependency. const char * depends_on
The option it depends on. const char * error_message
Custom error message (optional).

Detailed Description

Option dependency.

Describes a dependency relationship between two options.

Definition at line 331 of file builder.h.
